vpclattice.targetgroup.target.Id.Description: The ID of the target. If the target group type is `INSTANCE`, this is an instance ID. If the target group type is `IP`, this is an IP address. If the target group type is `LAMBDA`, this is the ARN of a Lambda function. If the target group type is `ALB`, this is the ARN of an Application Load Balancer.

vpclattice.targetgroup.target.Port.Description: The port on which the target is listening. For HTTP, the default is 80. For HTTPS, the default is 443.
